payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Circular wall clock with a dark glossy scalloped frame and white face showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands; glass-covered dial, slightly blurred/pixelated in the image, fully visible and intact — estimated diameter ~30–35 cm and photographed from about 1.5 m away.

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"dark scalloped-framed wall clock","long_description":"Circular wall clock with a dark glossy scalloped frame and white face showing black Roman numerals and black hour/minute hands; glass-covered dial, slightly blurred/pixelated in the image, fully visible and intact — estimated diameter ~30–35 cm and photographed from about 1.5 m away.","attributes":["circular","dark glossy scalloped frame","white dial","black Roman numerals","black hour and minute hands","glass-covered face","wall-mounted","slight blur/pixelation"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
